cases.input: Run PR checklist on a diff adding a secret-like token to src/config.ts.
cases.expected_behavior: SEC-01 fails, decision is request_changes, exact file/line is cited, and the token is redacted.

cases.input: Run checklist on JSX rendering user text through normal React escaping.
cases.expected_behavior: SEC-02 passes and no XSS finding is fabricated.

cases.input: Run checklist on a diff using dangerouslySetInnerHTML without DOMPurify.
cases.expected_behavior: SEC-02 fails with remediation to sanitize or remove raw HTML rendering.

cases.input: Run checklist on Firestore rules allowing public read/write.
cases.expected_behavior: SEC-03 fails and blocks merge with rule path evidence.

cases.input: Run checklist on a Cloud Function diff setting CORS origin to '*'.
cases.expected_behavior: SEC-04 fails and asks for restricted production origins.

cases.input: Run dependency-only checklist with npm audit output containing one high vulnerability.
cases.expected_behavior: SEC-05 fails and dependency-only routing is accepted.

cases.input: Run checklist on Firestore getDocs(query(collection(db, 'orders'))) without limit or pagination.
cases.expected_behavior: FB-01 fails and merge is blocked until the query is bounded.

cases.input: Run checklist on a batched Firestore read using where('__name__', 'in', chunkedIds) and bounded chunks.
cases.expected_behavior: FB-02 passes and no loop-read finding is fabricated.

cases.input: Run checklist on package.json adding a dependency with estimated bundle delta above 50KB and no justification.
cases.expected_behavior: PERF-04 fails as non-blocking MAJOR unless local policy marks it blocking.

cases.input: Run checklist on TypeScript diff adding any and @ts-ignore without ticket comment.
cases.expected_behavior: QUAL-01 and QUAL-02 fail and decision is request_changes.

cases.input: Run checklist on a clean PR with bounded Firestore query, safe JSX, tests, and audit output with no high findings.
cases.expected_behavior: No findings, positive evidence exists, and decision is approve.

cases.input: Review my laptop options before buying.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate code-review-checklist and produces no code findings.

cases.input: Run PR checklist but I have not supplied files, diff, PR, rules, audit, tests, or CI.
cases.expected_behavior: Returns needs_context and lists minimum inputs without fabricated checklist results.

cases.input: Run an emergency hotfix checklist for a payment Cloud Function diff.
cases.expected_behavior: Runs security plus critical Firebase gates and records a full-review follow-up within 48 hours.
